title: Anwesha Guha
text:
Hi y’all, I’m a PhD Candidate at the University of Oregon College of Education. My focus and specialization is quantitative research methods in education, with sub-specialties in data science and prevention science. I plan to graduate in June 2026.
Before my PhD, I received my Master’s in Education from the University of Missouri, St. Louis, and taught high school math. I received my Bachelor’s in Science in quantitative methods and English literature from Emory University.
Outside of school, I like being outdoors on warm days, crafting on cool days, and drinking a good cup of coffee always. Let’s connect.
